accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; key provisions and timelines correctly described.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as increasing transparency for federal regulations affecting small businesses.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes changes to initial regulatory flexibility analysis requirements and 10-year periodic review.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the 10-day timeline for prima facie review and conditions for rule reinstatement.

effective_dates.why: Notes the 5-year lookback for the Section 610 enforcement provision.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers indirect cost analysis, petition process, guidance publication, and periodic review with automatic lapse.

correct_entities.why: SBA Chief Counsel for Advocacy, OIRA, regulations.gov correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
